mapper.select: SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, ep.paper_name, ep.duration, ep.total_score as total_score_of_paper, ep.pass_score, e.start_time as start_time_of_exam, e.end_time as end_time_of_exam FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id WHERE er.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT er.*, e.exam_name, ep.paper_name, ep.duration, ep.total_score as total_score_of_paper, ep.pass_score, e.start_time as start_time_of_exam, e.end_time as end_time_of_exam FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN exam e ON er.exam_id = e.exam_id LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id WHERE er.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY er.start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_record (exam_id, student_id, start_time, status, screen_switch_count, ip_address) VALUES (#{examId}, #{studentId}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{ipAddress})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_record SET submit_time = #{submitTime}, total_score = #{totalScore}, objective_score = #{objectiveScore}, subjective_score = #{subjectiveScore}, status = #{status}, screen_switch_count = #{screenSwitchCount} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE exam_record SET submit_time = NOW(), status = 1 WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
UPDATE exam_record SET screen_switch_count = screen_switch_count + 1 WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
